creator: db@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Ok, we have a problem.  I cannot get either py-scipy 0.5.1 in ports or a 
local version of py-scipy 0.5.2 to build with py-numpy 1.0.3 

I can get py-scipy in ports (0.5.1) to build with py-numpy 1.0.2, which 
was ready to go but couldn't due to the ports freeze. Would an interim 
commit of 1.0.2 be sufficient for your use now while the problem with 
the py-scipy build is investigated? I have 1.0.2 with fixes as given in 
PR 112429 all set to commit. 

- Diane
